# Chapter 4: Entropy and the arrow of time  (~100 pp)
- 4.1 Microscopic interpretation: Boltzmann (15) · 4.2 Statistical mechanics for engineers (15) · 4.3 Entropy in chemical and biological systems (12) · 4.4 Information entropy preview (10) · 4.5 Free energy and equilibrium (15) · 4.6 The arrow of time and the second law as observation (15) · 4.7 Failure section: statistical fluctuations vs systematic violations (18)

**Archetype**: stability, uncertainty. **Project**: simulate a small ideal gas; measure the spontaneous entropy increase. **Exercises**: 30.
